Home/Services/Trex calm shell
Deck Resurfacing

Upgrade Your Deck with Trex Calm Shell Resurfacing

Give your old deck a fresh, modern look with Trex Calm Shell - a premium composite color designed for durability, style, and low maintenance.

Call (571) 655-7207

Free estimate • No obligation • Fully permitted builds

A Smarter Alternative to Full Replacement

What is Deck Resurfacing?

Deck resurfacing allows you to keep your existing structure while upgrading the surface with new composite decking.

  • Save money vs full rebuild
  • Faster installation
  • Modern look without major construction
  • Extend the life of your deck

Why Trex Calm Shell

Clean, Modern & Built to Last.

  • Soft Neutral Color: A soft, neutral tone that perfectly complements any house exterior and landscape.
  • High-Performance: Superior scratch, stain, and fade resistance backed by a strong manufacturer warranty.
  • Low Maintenance: Never sand, stain, or paint your deck again. A simple soap-and-water cleaning is all it takes.
  • Eco-Friendly: Made from 95% recycled materials, it's an environmentally conscious choice.

What is Deck Resurfacing?

A Smarter Alternative to Full Replacement.

  • Cost-Effective: Save money compared to a full rebuild by utilizing your existing framing.
  • Faster Installation: Complete your project in less time with fewer structural building requirements.
  • Structural Evaluation: We carefully inspect your sub-structure to guarantee it is safe and built to code before adding new boards.
  • Complete Upgrade: Enjoy a brand new, modern deck surface without the mess of major demolition.

The Resurfacing Process

How we transform your existing structure.

Step 1: Frame Inspection

We evaluate your existing deck structure to ensure it is sound and meets code requirements.

Step 2: Old Board Removal

Safe tear-down and disposal of your old, worn-out wood or composite surface boards.

Step 3: Joist Protection

Application of joist tape to prevent future rot and extend the life of your existing wood frame.

Step 4: Surface Installation

Precision installation of your new Trex Calm Shell decking with hidden fasteners.

Step 5: Final Review

Final walkthrough to ensure a perfect, durable finish.

See the Transformation

From weathered wood to a beautiful Trex surface.

Why LDN Decks

Your dedicated local Trex installer.

Local Team

Proudly serving Loudoun County and Northern Virginia.

Trusted

Certified Builders

Extensive experience with Trex composite systems.

Craftsmanship

Clean, detail-oriented installation and high-quality finishes.

Satisfaction

Driven by 5-star customer reviews and long-lasting durability.

Local Expertise Across Northern Virginia

Loudoun Decks is a trusted deck builder serving Loudoun County, Fairfax County, Prince William County, Arlington, and Stafford.
